     The Numbers Business Report

Resident Evil: Retribution (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,345,531Details
International Box Office $198,302,098
Worldwide Box Office $240,647,629
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,339,018
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,826,431
Total $24,165,449
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Umbrella Corporation's deadly T-virus continues to ravage the Earth, transforming the global population into legions of the flesh eating Undead. The human race's last and only hope, Alice, awakens in the heart of Umbrella's most clandestine operations facility and unveils more of her mysterious past as she delves further into the complex. Without a safe haven, Alice continues to hunt those responsible for the outbreak; a chase that takes her from Tokyo to New York, Washington, D.C. and Moscow, culminating in a mind-blowing revelation that will force her to rethink everything that she once thought to be true. Aided by newfound allies and familiar friends, Alice must fight to survive long enough to escape a hostile world on the brink of oblivion. The countdown has begun.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,052,227 (49.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:17.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,012 opening theaters/3,016 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,624,688

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 14th, 2012 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: September 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Trinidad)
September 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Taiwan)
September 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Jamaica)
September 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Philippines)
September 12th, 2012 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: December 21st, 2012 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of strong violence throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2236, 8/15/2012)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Resident Evil
Cast, crew, or production detail: Sequels With Returning Stars
Film format: 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Cloning, Corporate Malfeasance, Monster, Zombies
Social setting: Epidemic, Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Constantin Film, Davis Films, Impact Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The Umbrella Corporation's deadly T-virus continues to ravage the Earth, transforming the global population into legions of the flesh eating Undead. The human race's last and only hope, Alice, awakens in the heart of Umbrella's most clandestine operations facility and unveils more of her mysterious past as she delves further into the complex. Without a safe haven, Alice continues to hunt those responsible for the outbreak; a chase that takes her from Tokyo to New York, Washington, D.C. and Moscow, culminating in a mind-blowing revelation that will force her to rethink everything that she once thought to be true. Aided by newfound allies and familiar friends, Alice must fight to survive long enough to escape a hostile world on the brink of oblivion. The countdown has begun.
